name: Add Smooth Hover Effect to Sign Up Button
goal: Implement a smooth hover effect on the sign-up button in SignUpForm.tsx.
summary: Enhance the user experience by adding a smooth hover effect to the sign-up button.

files_to_modify.purpose: Add smooth hover effect to the sign-up button.
files_to_modify.content:
const buttonClass = 'rounded-xl bg-[#ff8a3d] text-white px-4 py-2 transition duration-300 ease-in-out transform hover:scale-105 hover:bg-[#ff5e4d]';

<button type="submit" className={buttonClass} disabled={submitting}>Sign Up</button>

acceptance_criteria: The sign-up button should smoothly scale up and change color on hover.
The button should remain accessible and functional during the hover effect.
notes: Ensure that the hover effect is consistent with the overall design language of the application.
